overview: A live DNS security and network threat analysis tool that lets users compare two domains side-by-side. It validates DNSSEC, nameserver legitimacy, DNS hijacking risks, and TLD validity, then displays results in a combined threat dashboard with interactive 3D visualizations and an immersive 3D background.
features: Live DNS security analysis (DNSSEC, nameserver, hijacking, TLD checks)
Side-by-side domain comparison with synchronized threat scoring
Combined threat dashboard with category breakdowns and risk matrix
Immersive 3D background with animated globe and particle DNS flows
Interactive 3D radar/spider charts and threat matrix visualizations
Drill-down remediation guides for each detected risk
